verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If I listen, Will my ears know the sound of Your voice? Show me Your voice! If I seek You, Will You quiet the storm in my mind? Quiet my mind! If You search me, Will You say that I'm good and faithful? Am I good and faithful?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If you're speaking Lord, I wanna hear every word You've seen all my faults Yet you've wash me white as snow I thought I was lost But your love has called me back to life You called me home And you loved me like your own.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've been wandering Bring me back to the straight and narrow Oh, the straight and narrow You renew me From the ash I can rise to stand tall Oh, I can stand tall
